subcodes.first_line: O Bahram, be thou faithful and seek after faithfulness! In the world of humanity, the attribute of fidelity is the means of attaining the highest aspirations [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بهرام وفادار وفاجو باش و وفاخو در عالم انسانی خصلت وفا سبب حصول اعظم آرزو
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @characteristics and conduct of true believers
